news.t: AllianzIM to Transfer Exchange Listings and Fund Name Changes
AllianzIM Announces New Upside Caps for January Series of U.S. Large Cap Buffered ETFs
AllianzIM Announces New Upside Caps for July Series of U.S. Large Cap Buffered Outcome ETFs
AllianzIM Debuts Second Buffered Outcome ETF With 6-Month Outcome Period and Announces New Upside Caps for January Series

overview.description: The AllianzIM U.S. Equity 6 Month Buffer10 Jan/Jul ETF (SIXJ) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust over a specific holdings period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. SIXJ was launched on Dec 31, 2021 and is issued by Allianz.

data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AllianzIM today announced new upside caps for the July series of its U.S. Large Cap Buffered Outcome ETFs suite (NYSE Arca: AZAL, AZBL and SIXJ)

data.title: AllianzIM Debuts Second Buffered Outcome ETF With 6-Month Outcome Period and Announces New Upside Caps for January Series
data.text: MINNEAPOLIS--(BUSINESS WIRE)--AllianzIM today launched a new buffered outcome ETF with a six-month outcome period: the AllianzIM U.S. Large Cap 6 Month Buffer10 Jan/Jul ETF.
